{"code":";; Get the assignee with the most 'in_progress' issues
(def max-assignee
  (->> (linear_issues {:state "in_progress"})
       (group-by :assignee)
       (map (fn [[assignee issues]] [assignee (count issues)]))
       (apply max-key second)
       first))
